attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
      POS_TV.POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
	POS_TV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
	POS_TV.SK_UNIQUE_ID_INT, 
	POS_TV.TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
	POS_TV.DSV_BOOKINGS_FLG, 
	POS_TV.ACTIVE_FLG, 
	POS_TV.SRC_CREATED_DTM, 
	POS_TV.DV_SRC_CREATED_DT, 
	POS_TV.SRC_CREATED_PROCESS_NAME, 
	POS_TV.SRC_UPDATED_DTM, 
	POS_TV.DV_SRC_UPDATED_DT, 
	POS_TV.SRC_UPDATED_PROCESS_NAME, 
	POS_TV.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
	POS_TV.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
	POS_TV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
	POS_TV.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	POS_TV.SRC_RPTD_QUOTE_NUM, 
	POS_TV.SRC_RPTD_CONTRACT_NUM, 
	POS_TV.SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE_KEY, 
	POS_TV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
	POS_TV.MATCHING_MTHD_FOR_TAGGING_NAME, 
	POS_TV.SRC_RPTD_ERP_SO_HEADER_ID, 
	POS_TV.SRC_RPTD_ERP_QUOTE_HEADER_ID, 
	POS_TV.SRC_RPTD_REVENUE_SRC_CD, 
	POS_TV.SALES_MOTION_CD, 
	POS_TV.CONFIDENCE_FLG,
	POS_TV.SPLIT_PCT,
	POS_TV.PO_EXISTS_FLG   ,              
    POS_TV.PO_DISTRI_EXISTS_FLG,
    POS_TV.PO_PRDT_EXISTS_FLG,         
    POS_TV.QUOTE_EXISTS_FLG,           
    POS_TV.QUOTE_DISTRI_EXISTS_FLG,
    POS_TV.QUOTE_PRDT_EXISTS_FLG,      
    POS_TV.MULTIPLE_SALES_MOTION_FLG,  
    POS_TV.LINKED_TO_MULTIPLE_SOL_FLG,
    POS_TV.SOFTWARE_OR_SERVICE_FLG,
    POS_TV.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD
	,POS_TV.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE
	,POS_TV.REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
	,POS_TV.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM
	,POS_TV.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT
	,POS_TV.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_REASON_DESC
	,POS_TV.BK_ORIG_POS_TRX_ID_INT
	,POS_TV.ORIG_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NW_RNWL_KEY
	,POS_TV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
	,POS_TV.SOFTWARE_FLG	
	,POS_TV.RENEWAL_REF_ID
	,POS_TV.RENEWAL_REF_CD
	,POS_TV.RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS
	,POS_TV.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_TV POS_TV
WHERE POS_TV.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'

SELECT 
    W_POS.POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
              W_POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
              W_POS.SK_UNIQUE_ID_INT, 
              W_POS.TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
              W_POS.DSV_BOOKINGS_FLG, 
              W_POS.ACTIVE_FLG, 
              W_POS.SRC_CREATED_DTM, 
              W_POS.DV_SRC_CREATED_DT, 
              W_POS.SRC_CREATED_PROCESS_NAME, 
              W_POS.SRC_UPDATED_DTM, 
              W_POS.DV_SRC_UPDATED_DT, 
              W_POS.SRC_UPDATED_PROCESS_NAME, 
              W_POS.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
              W_POS.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
              W_POS.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
              W_POS.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
              W_POS.SRC_RPTD_QUOTE_NUM, 
              W_POS.SRC_RPTD_CONTRACT_NUM, 
              W_POS.SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE_KEY, 
              W_POS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
              W_POS.MATCHING_MTHD_FOR_TAGGING_NAME, 
              W_POS.SRC_RPTD_ERP_SO_HEADER_ID, 
              W_POS.SRC_RPTD_ERP_QUOTE_HEADER_ID, 
              W_POS.SRC_RPTD_REVENUE_SRC_CD, 
              W_POS.SALES_MOTION_CD, 
              W_POS.CONFIDENCE_FLG,
    W_POS.SPLIT_PCT,
              W_POS.START_TV_DTM, 
              W_POS.END_TV_DTM ,
              W_POS.PO_EXISTS_FLG ,                
              W_POS.PO_DISTRI_EXISTS_FLG,
              W_POS.PO_PRDT_EXISTS_FLG,         
              W_POS.QUOTE_EXISTS_FLG,           
              W_POS.QUOTE_DISTRI_EXISTS_FLG,
              W_POS.QUOTE_PRDT_EXISTS_FLG,      
              W_POS.MULTIPLE_SALES_MOTION_FLG,
              W_POS.LINKED_TO_MULTIPLE_SOL_FLG,
    W_POS.SOFTWARE_OR_SERVICE_FLG,
    W_POS.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD
    ,W_POS.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE
    ,W_POS.REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
    ,W_POS.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM
    ,W_POS.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT
    ,W_POS.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_REASON_DESC
    ,W_POS.BK_ORIG_POS_TRX_ID_INT
    ,W_POS.ORIG_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NW_RNWL_KEY
	,W_POS.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
	,W_POS.SOFTWARE_FLG
	,COALESCE(W_POS.RENEWAL_REF_ID,'UNKNOWN')
	,COALESCE(W_POS.RENEWAL_REF_CD,'UNKNOWN')
	,COALESCE(W_POS.RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS,-9999)
	,COALESCE(W_POS.RENEWAL_REF_RULE,'UNKNOWN')
FROM $$WORKDB.W_POS_TRX_LINE_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL W_POS
WHERE /* W_POS.DML_TYPE = 'I' */ /* Commenting as part of PNVR TV change SMR Aug 16th release */
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_TV NR 
                 WHERE NR.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = W_POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT /* as part of PNVR TV change SMR Aug 16th release */
                 AND NR.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00')
